items.title: Newsletter 6/8
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: WSL 2 side Durham face threat of closure
items.summary: Women's Super League 2 side Durham warn "the club will have to cease operations at all levels" unless a buyer can be found in three weeks.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: County cricket: Surrey v Hampshire day two – live
items.summary: Live Championship updates from 11am UK time Email Tanya | MCC apologises for Lord’s pitch But, they are are peeling off the sheets… Dan Lawrence spoke to the reporter’s network...
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
